achievements.title: Feeling So Fly Like a G-3
achievements.description: Find the downed plane and go into the nearby town
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Not Gestapo-ing Around
achievements.description: Eliminate the Gestapo inside of the town, destroy their radio, and enter the Maquis Hideout
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: A Mouse in a Sewer of Rats
achievements.description: Grab the G-3's case and make your way out of the sewers
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Serving Up Gestapo in a Bowl
achievements.description: Get 30 kills in a single level in Mission 1
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Just the Kind of Man We're Looking For
achievements.description: Complete any level from Mission 1 with less than 30 hits and 20 or more kills
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Glory to Sodor
achievements.description: Switch the train tracks and infiltrate deeper into the train station
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: I Always Wanted a Red Ryder
achievements.description: Steal the freight manifest, obtain the explosives package, and blow up the railgun's reserve engine
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Because We're American Heroes!
achievements.description: Destroy the fuel containers and make your way to the railgun
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Left Swipe to Greta
achievements.description: Destroy the railgun
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Panther-Style Infiltration
achievements.description: Get 30 kills in a single level in Mission 2
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Cloaked in the Blood of My Enemy
achievements.description: Complete any level from Mission 2 with less than 30 hits and 20 or more kills
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: A Wrench in Their Plans
achievements.description: Jam the engine of the Wolfram and exit through the cargo hold
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: The View Is Always Better from the Rooftops
achievements.description: Steal the deployment timetable, then blow up a cargo truck and make your way inside of the production facility
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: The Lair of the Hunters
achievements.description: Steal the prototype's engine specs and hull blueprints, destroy the sea gate controls, and board the prototype before it departs
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: A Metal Tomb at the Bottom of the Sea
achievements.description: Destroy the prototype U-Boat from the inside
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: The Hunters Become the Hunted
achievements.description: Get 30 kills in a single level in Mission 3
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: A U-Boat on Land
achievements.description: Complete any level from Mission 3 with less than 30 hits and 20 or more kills
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Penetrating the Impenetrable
achievements.description: Destroy a Stuka dive bomber and gain access to the sublevel of the fort
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Deep Below in the Fort's Gallows
achievements.description: Send a false SOS, steal Colonel Muller's orders, and get down to the lower levels of the fort
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: French's Yellow Mustard Gas
achievements.description: Flood the fort with mustard gas and violate the Geneva Convention
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: It Isn't the Gas That Kills You
achievements.description: Get 30 kills in a single level in Mission 4
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Dug In Tighter than Fort Knox
achievements.description: Complete any level from Mission 4 with less than 30 hits and 20 or more kills
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: This Powers Only the Power Plant, Right?
achievements.description: Destroy the hydrodam power relays and grid and make your way inside the power plant
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Making Heavy Ice Cubes
achievements.description: Disable the plant's generators and heating tanks, destroy all the research files, and steal the D2O output report
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Light Water Is Superior
achievements.description: Destroy the remaining D2O in the facility, steal the delivery schedule, and destroy the cargo truck
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Your Package Has Been Delayed
achievements.description: Destroy both trucks carrying D2O, the backup generator, and the ferry before it departs for Germany
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Red Snow Up in Norway
achievements.description: Get 30 kills in a single level in Mission 5
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: The Arctic Fox
achievements.description: Complete any level from Mission 5 with less than 30 hits and 20 or more kills
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Plot Twist: They Use Electric Generators
achievements.description: Destroy the fuel for the generators and make your way inside the mine
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: An Explosive Read for Later
achievements.description: Eliminate the SS Demo Squad and recover the Dahood Manuscript
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: It All Belongs in a Museum
achievements.description: Procure the Curator's inventory sheet and disarm all the bombs before they go off
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Blood-Soaked Canvas
achievements.description: Get 30 kills in a single level in Mission 6
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Watch the Fine Art
achievements.description: Complete any level from Mission 6 with less than 30 hits and 20 or more kills
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: It's Too Cold for a Launch Today
achievements.description: Find the V1 target list and disable the launch controls for the V1
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Maybe We Should Make Our Own Nuclear Missile
achievements.description: Acquire the scientist roster and the V2 schematics, then disable the gyro guidance system for the V2
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: A German Nuclear Winter
achievements.description: Launch the sabotaged V2 Rocket and destroy Nordhausen
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Proud to Be an OSS Agent
achievements.description: Get 30 kills in a single level in Mission 7
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: An American Nightmare
achievements.description: Complete any level from Mission 7 with less than 30 hits and 20 or more kills
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Those Helmets Are Useless
achievements.description: Get 20 headshots in a single level
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Like a Bull Behind Enemy Lines
achievements.description: Destroy 10 objects in a single level
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Make Your Shots Count
achievements.description: Complete any level with 100% accuracy
achievements.author: salvadorc17

achievements.title: Untouchable Soldier of War
achievements.description: Complete any final level in a mission with no hits
achievements.author: salvadorc17
